chapter_voice_summary: Chapter 2's voice is didactic and corrective; Krishna teaches, sometimes sharply. BG 2.11 — the chapter's pivot from corrective sharpness (2.2-2.3) to philosophical instruction — preserves the diagnostic edge while moving into doctrine. The engineering layer for 2.11 reads as the senior architect calmly but sharply naming a misplacement ('You are mourning the wrong thing... Land the deprecation'), which matches the chapter voice precisely. The verse does not soften into consolation, does not become motivational, and does not relax into pure description. The corrective tone of 2.2-2.3 has matured into the diagnostic tone of 2.11, which is the right pedagogical arc. The progression to a more expansive sāṅkhya teaching voice has begun without abandoning the chapter's hard edge.
